# pc-emulation-book custom dictionary

# framework stuff
mdbook
peaceiris

# technical terms
bitfield
bitfields
regs
scancode
scancodes
microcontroller
typematic

datasheets
ascii
scanlines

freqs
HSYNC
VSYNC

CRTC's
grayscale
dipswitch
RGBI

chipsets
VLSI
PLCC
CMII
ERAM
overscan
NTSC
subcarrier
hdots
hsync
hclock
lclock
rasterizes
rasterizing
DREQ
Datasheet
underclock
Hmos
rgba
keydown
Vsync
INTA
DACK
LSBMSB
hdot
vsync
